A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

do you have experience with water cure?

Health · asked by user [] · 2007-08-26 · 6 answers
would like to know from firsthand experience
user [19] · 2007-08-27
what is water cure?
user [2] · 2007-08-27
example: one website,
http://watercure.com/
another,
http://sacred-texts.com/hin/av/av02003.htm
user [19] · 2007-08-27
interesting since i am thirsty most of the time.
user [2] · 2007-08-27
more interesting, is that after a while the body suppresses the thirst sensation, and sometimes you think you are hungry and youre really thirsty
The author of that book suggests that the main cause for degenerative illnesses is dehydration..
If you drink water first thing in the morning probably you will see how your intestinal problems go away plus many other benefits.
Modern science will never back something that doesnt cost anything. Patient cured, customer gone.
user [78] · 2007-08-27
[quote][cite] mishra:[/cite]
If you drink water first thing in the morning probably you will see how your intestinal problems go away plus many other benefits.
[/quote]

Cant really drink first thing in the morning. I have to brush my teeth first, hehe
user [12] · 2007-08-27
[quote][cite] Servant Krsna:[/cite]Cant really drink first thing in the morning. I have to brush my teeth first, hehe[/quote]

This is just a western habit, ayurvedic doctors say you can drink water first thing before brushing teeth.
